was a pro basketball league run by the NBA just after the [2012 NBA draft](/wiki/2012_NBA_draft "2012 NBA draft"). It took place in [Orlando, Florida](/wiki/Orlando,_Florida "Orlando, Florida") from July 9 to 13 and in [Las Vegas](/wiki/Las_Vegas_Valley "Las Vegas Valley"), [Nevada](/wiki/Nevada "Nevada") from July 13 to 22, 2012. [Damian Lillard](/wiki/Damian_Lillard "Damian Lillard") ([Portland Trail Blazers](/wiki/Portland_Trail_Blazers "Portland Trail Blazers")) and [Josh Selby](/wiki/Josh_Selby "Josh Selby") (Memphis Grizzlies) won the MVP honors.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

first_paragraph: The **2012 [NBA Summer League](/wiki/NBA_Summer_League "NBA Summer League")** was a pro basketball league run by the NBA just after the [2012 NBA draft](/wiki/2012_NBA_draft "2012 NBA draft"). It took place in [Orlando, Florida](/wiki/Orlando,_Florida "Orlando, Florida") from July 9 to 13 and in [Las Vegas](/wiki/Las_Vegas_Valley "Las Vegas Valley"), [Nevada](/wiki/Nevada "Nevada") from July 13 to 22, 2012. [Damian Lillard](/wiki/Damian_Lillard "Damian Lillard") ([Portland Trail Blazers](/wiki/Portland_Trail_Blazers "Portland Trail Blazers")) and [Josh Selby](/wiki/Josh_Selby "Josh Selby") (Memphis Grizzlies) won the MVP honors.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The **2012 [NBA Summer League](/wiki/NBA_Summer_League "NBA Summer League")** was a pro basketball league run by the NBA just after the [2012 NBA draft](/wiki/2012_NBA_draft "2012 NBA draft"). It took place in [Orlando, Florida](/wiki/Orlando,_Florida "Orlando, Florida") from July 9 to 13 and in [Las Vegas](/wiki/Las_Vegas_Valley "Las Vegas Valley"), [Nevada](/wiki/Nevada "Nevada") from July 13 to 22, 2012. [Damian Lillard](/wiki/Damian_Lillard "Damian Lillard") ([Portland Trail Blazers](/wiki/Portland_Trail_Blazers "Portland Trail Blazers")) and [Josh Selby](/wiki/Josh_Selby "Josh Selby") (Memphis Grizzlies) won the MVP honors.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Players

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Players")]

A list of players who participated can be viewed [here](http://www.nba.com/summer-league/2012/players/)

## Orlando Summer League

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Orlando Summer League")]

### Teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Teams")]

The following is a list of teams that participated in the Orlando Summer League

* [Boston Celtics](/wiki/Boston_Celtics "Boston Celtics")
* [Detroit Pistons](/wiki/Detroit_Pistons "Detroit Pistons")
* [Oklahoma City Thunder](/wiki/Oklahoma_City_Thunder "Oklahoma City Thunder")
* [Utah Jazz](/wiki/Utah_Jazz "Utah Jazz")
* [Indiana Pacers](/wiki/Indiana_Pacers "Indiana Pacers")
* [Orlando Magic](/wiki/Orlando_Magic "Orlando Magic")
* [Brooklyn Nets](/wiki/Brooklyn_Nets "Brooklyn Nets")
* [Philadelphia 76ers](/wiki/Philadelphia_76ers "Philadelphia 76ers")

Boxscores and recaps of each game can be viewed [here](http://www.nba.com/magic/news/airtran-airways-orlando-pro-summer-league-scores)

### July 9 scores

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: July 9 scores")]

* Orlando Magic beat Brooklyn Nets, 92–88
* Boston Celtics beat Oklahoma City Thunder, 73–65
* Detroit Pistons beat Utah Jazz, 76–73
* Indiana Pacers beat Philadelphia 76ers, 69–63

### July 10 scores

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: July 10 scores")]

* Utah Jazz beat Philadelphia 76ers, 84–80
* Indiana Pacers beat Oklahoma City Thunder, 78–74
* Detroit Pistons beat Orlando Magic, 79–74
* Boston Celtics beat Brooklyn Nets, 82–73

### July 11 scores

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: July 11 scores")]

* Boston Celtics beat Indiana Pacers, 85–77
* Oklahoma City Thunder beat Detroit Pistons, 83–62
* Philadelphia 76ers beat Brooklyn Nets, 79–71
* Utah Jazz beat Orlando Magic, 79–75

### July 12 scores

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: July 12 scores")]

* Detroit Pistons beat Boston Celtics, 93–79
* Oklahoma City Thunder beat Brooklyn Nets, 87–86
* Utah Jazz beat Indiana Pacers, 87–81
* Orlando Magic beat Philadelphia 76ers, 77–75

### July 13 scores

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_NBA_Summer_League&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: July 13 scores")]

* Utah Jazz beat Oklahoma City Thunder, 89–75
* Boston Celtics beat Orlando Magic, 94–73
* Detroit Pistons beat Philadelphia 76ers, 71–67
* Brooklyn Nets beat Indiana Pacers, 90–77
